blurb_en: Tencent dropped HunyuanVideo 1.5 on GitHub on May 4 — a fully open text-to-video model that runs on a single consumer gaming GPU in under two minutes. The 8.3-billion-parameter model ships under an Apache 2.0 license, meaning anyone can fork it, modify it, or build commercial products on top without asking permission. It handles text, image-to-video, depth control, and reference-image styling in a single checkpoint. Tencent calls it the strongest open video foundation model in the world, which may well be true for about three weeks.
blurb_zh: 腾讯5月4日把HunyuanVideo 1.5扔上了GitHub——开源、免费、Apache 2.0协议，随便商用。83亿参数，单张消费级显卡不到两分钟出720p视频，文本、图生视频、深度控制全都支持，一个模型搞定。官方自称「全球最强开源视频基础模型」——信不信由你，反正全世界都在用自己的游戏显卡验证这个说法。
verification_notes: Confirmed via GitHub repo (Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5) and Hugging Face model card. Multiple secondary sources corroborate May 4 release. Cited GitHub directly per learnings guidance on avoiding VO3 AI Blog as primary.

blurb_en: At Berlin's Neue Nationalgalerie, robot dogs fitted with hyper-realistic silicone heads of Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg are roaming the gallery, filming visitors with onboard cameras, processing the footage through AI styled to each figure's aesthetic, and ejecting printed artworks from their rear ends for guests to take home. The exhibition is called Regular Animals, runs through May 10, and marks Beeple's first show in Germany. Andy Warhol, Pablo Picasso, and Beeple himself also get the dog-head treatment. Beeple's last major piece sold for $69 million; these prints are free.
blurb_zh: 柏林新国家美术馆正在展出Beeple的新装置艺术《 Regular Animals》——机器狗顶着马斯克、贝佐斯、扎克伯格的硬胶头，在馆内四处游荡，用车载摄像头拍下观众，经过「对应人物风格」AI处理后，从屁股打印出来送给观众带走。展览还给沃霍尔、毕加索和Beeple本人也做了同款机器狗。展览展至5月10日，是Beeple首次在德国亮相。他上一件大作拍出6900万美元；这批印刷品免费。
verification_notes: Exhibition confirmed via Neue Nationalgalerie official site (smb.museum), Euronews (April 29), NPR (May 3), ABC News, Hollywood Reporter, artnet, ArtAtBerlin. Multiple independent sources corroborate robot dog details, print-from-rear mechanic, exhibition dates April 29-May 10.

blurb_en: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni this week publicly shared an AI-generated nude image of herself — one of several deepfakes her political opponents had been circulating online — to warn about the dangers of the technology. Meloni noted, with what appeared to be genuine amusement, that whoever created the image "actually improved my appearance quite a bit." Italy passed an AI law last year making deepfakes a criminal offense. It appears enforcement has not quite caught up with demand.
blurb_zh: 意大利总理梅洛尼本周亲自把一张自己的AI裸照合成图发到社交媒体——原图由政治对手散布，她转发是为了警示换脸技术的危害。她评价，制图者「说实话，挤会改进我外貌的」。意大利去年已立法将AI换脸定为刑事犯罪，只是执法进度似乎跟不上创作热情。
verification_notes: Confirmed via PetaPixel (May 6), Washington Post (May 5), Fast Company, OECD.AI incident tracker. Multiple independent sources corroborate: Meloni shared the image herself, quipped it improved her appearance, Italy existing AI deepfake law.

blurb_en: Coinbase cut 700 employees on May 5 — 14% of its workforce — and CEO Brian Armstrong was unusually candid about why: AI now writes over 65% of Coinbase's code, and he says it can complete in days what used to take a team of engineers weeks. The company is replacing what Armstrong calls "pure managers" with "player-coaches" and building teams as small as one person directing clusters of AI agents. Armstrong also warned that mass AI-driven layoffs are coming to "every company." Coinbase estimates restructuring costs of $50 to $60 million, which is not cheap for the privilege of explaining to 700 people that an algorithm is better at their job.
blurb_zh: 加密货币交易所Coinbase 5月5日裁员700人，占全员14%，CEO布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗毫不遥掩：公右65%的新代码由AI生成，过去团队要做几周的事AI几天搞定。公司用「球员型教练」替代纯管理层，甚至组建由一人指挥一批AI智能体的团队。阿姆斯特朗还警告，AI驱动的大规模裁员将席卷「每一家公司」。此次重组预计5000至6000万美元——用来告知700名员工算法比他们更胜任，价格不算便宜。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC (May 5), Bloomberg (May 5), Fortune (May 5), Deadline, Variety. All corroborate 700 employees, 14%, AI rationale, player-coaches terminology, Armstrong broader warning about industry-wide layoffs.

blurb_en: AI music startup Udio admitted in an April 29 court filing that it scraped YouTube audio using YT-DLP — a stream-ripping tool — to train its model, revealing that some of what makes Udio sound like music is borrowed from music. The acknowledgment comes in response to Sony Music Entertainment's copyright infringement lawsuit, the last major-label case still active after Universal and Warner both settled earlier this year. Udio is defending on fair use grounds, arguing that user-generated songs are entirely new regardless of what went in. The fair use ruling is expected this summer, and will tell us whether "I transformed it" is a legal defense or just a good excuse.
blurb_zh: AI音乐公司Udio在4月29日的法庭文件中承认，曾用YT-DLP工具从 YouTube抓取音频训练模型——说白了，就是用别人的歌训练出了会唱歌的AI。此案是索尼音乐的版权侵权诉诉，环球和华纳已分别和解，索尼是最后一家还在打的主要唱片公司。Udio以「合理使用」抗辩，称用户生成内容是全新创作，与训练数据无关。今夏将有裁决——屌时我们就知道「我把它变成了新东西」究竟是法律答辩还是借口。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Digital Music News (May 1), Music Business Worldwide (primary admission article with court filing PDF), Music Ally roundup (May 6). Court filing dated April 29, 2026 (SDNY). YT-DLP admission, Sony last active major label, fair use defense, summer ruling expected.

blurb_en: DeepSeek released V4 on April 24 — a 1.6-trillion-parameter open model that runs on domestic Chinese chips from Huawei and Cambricon rather than Nvidia hardware. It ships under an MIT license, and the company's own technical paper describes it as "3 to 6 months behind" state-of-the-art frontier models. Last year, DeepSeek R1 rattled global markets and briefly wiped hundreds of billions from Nvidia's valuation. V4 arrives quieter — with fewer fireworks and more honesty about where it actually stands.
blurb_zh: DeepSeek 4月24日发布了V4系列——旗舰版V4-Pro共1.6万亿参数，跑在华为和寒武纪的国产芯片上，不用英伟达。MIT协议开源，可免费下载。官方技术报告坦承，V4落后顶级闭源模型「三到六个月」。去年R1一出，英伟达市值瞬间蕃发数千亿美元；这次V4登场，动静小多了，但更诚实。
verification_notes: Confirmed via MIT Technology Review (April 24), CNBC (April 24), Fortune (April 24), Al Jazeera, Euronews, CFR analysis. All corroborate V4-Pro 1.6T params, Huawei/Cambricon chips, MIT license, company 3-6 month gap admission.
